Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 226 

DESCRIPTION: The date on which the surgical procedure was performed during the beneficiary's stay. This element 
corresponds with the surgical procedure code (variables called PRCDRCD1–PRCDRCD25). 

SHORT NAME: PRCDRDT1
